baseline_solo.reasoning_summary: DRMA exhibits severe profitability headwinds (negative PE, ROE, ROA) with insufficient fundamental data to support either long or short thesis. Recent earnings miss (EPS -3.15 vs -1.5 est) and multiple reverse splits (1:15, 1:16) signal distress. Alt-data is sparse: Wikipedia pageviews are low (~8-25/day), GitHub unmapped, no recent news post-cutoff. Analyst sentiment (1 Strong Buy) is descriptor-only and contradicted by fundamentals. Insider grants (no sales) are neutral. Macro regime (Moderately Restrictive, 30% equity cap) restricts position sizing. Information integrity assessment blocks primary-signal use. Fail-closed: insufficient evidence for surge_short (no corroborating alt-data catalyst) and insufficient evidence for quality_long (negative profitability, missing fundamentals). Decision: no_trade pending more evidence.

analyst_sentiment_weak: 1 Strong Buy (descriptor-only, contradicted by fundamentals)

insider_activity_neutral: 4 grants (Jan 2025), 0 sales — no conviction signal

suggested_improvements: Obtain complete fundamental snapshot (income statement, balance sheet, cash flow) with PIT-safe filing dates
Retrieve recent news/catalyst narrative (news_event_summary currently empty post-cutoff)
Wire industry-specific alt-data adapters (biotech_clinical_adapter if DRMA is biotech) to assess pipeline/clinical progress

Implement information_integrity_assessment pollution-defense layer to enable primary-signal use
Obtain 13F institutional ownership data (currently not_available_on_current_plan) to assess smart-money positioning
Clarify insider grant context: are these equity refreshes (neutral) or compensation for distress (negative)?

information_integrity_assessment.use_as_primary_signal_allowed=false — pollution-defense layer not implemented in v1

baseline_solo.schema_or_prompt_weakness_notes: Baseline solo agent must synthesize all evidence in one shot without upstream specialist verdicts. This creates a single point of failure: if any critical block is absent (fundamental_snapshot, news_event_summary, alt_data), the agent cannot decompose the decision into catalyst → corroboration → fundamentals → sleeve fit → risk. The multi-agent pipeline would have Agent-02 (Narrative) flag the missing catalyst, Agent-03 (Alt-Data) flag the missing corroboration, and Agent-04 (Fundamentals) flag the missing data — each with explicit confidence downweights. Here, the agent must collapse all three into a single 'no_trade' decision. This is the intended ablation: the baseline is less granular and less auditable.
recommended_followups: Obtain fundamental snapshot (income, balance, cashflow) with filing_date <= 2025-03-27
Retrieve news/catalyst narrative for DRMA in 7d window pre-decision
Wire biotech_clinical_adapter if DRMA is a biotech company (clinical trial data, FDA events)
Resolve GitHub mapping or confirm DRMA is not a software/devtools company
Obtain 13F institutional ownership data to assess smart-money positioning
Clarify insider grant context and assess whether it signals distress or routine equity refresh
Re-evaluate once macro regime shifts to less restrictive (equity_cap > 30%)
baseline_solo.reason: Insufficient evidence for surge_short (no corroborating alt-data catalyst, sparse news, weak fundamentals) and insufficient evidence for quality_long (negative profitability, missing fundamentals, macro headwind). Fail-closed per rule §13.4: when evidence is insufficient, emit no_trade with explicit evidence_missing list. Alt-data is primary verification mechanism; absence of alt-data signals (GitHub unmapped, 13F unavailable, retail attention not_evaluated) downgrades confidence to low. Fundamental snapshot status=insufficient_evidence blocks both sleeves. Decision locked until more evidence available.
risk_notes: Negative profitability (PE=-0.21, ROE=-1.31, ROA=-0.96) disqualifies quality_long sleeve
Earnings miss (EPS -3.15 vs est -1.5) on 2025-03-17 suggests deteriorating fundamentals
Multiple reverse splits (1:15 May 2024, 1:16 Mar 2023) are classic distress signals
Low price (1.35) post-splits suggests penny-stock territory; liquidity risk
Sparse alt-data (Wikipedia 8-25 views/day, GitHub unmapped, no news post-cutoff) prevents corroboration
Analyst sentiment (1 Strong Buy) is descriptor-only and contradicted by fundamentals; cannot override
Macro regime (Moderately Restrictive, 30% equity cap) restricts position sizing even if decision were positive
Insider grants (4 transactions Jan 2025, 0 sales) are neutral; no conviction signal
Information integrity assessment blocks primary-signal use (pollution-defense layer not implemented)
Fundamental snapshot insufficient_evidence blocks both surge_short and quality_long thresholds

rule_engine_path: 2. Assess macro_regime: Strengthening/Moderately Restrictive (stress_score=1), equity_cap=30%, equity_discipline=strict_quality_and_valuation → restrictive environment
3. Assess catalyst (news_event_summary): status=data_unavailable, 0 items post-cutoff, 20 items dropped post-cutoff → no narrative catalyst available

4. Assess corroboration (alternative_data_features): Wikipedia pageviews low (8-25/day), GitHub unmapped (failed), retail_meme_attention not_evaluated, valuation_context not_evaluated, sec_13f unavailable → sparse alt-data, cannot corroborate

5. Assess fundamentals (fundamental_snapshot, valuation_snapshot): fundamental_snapshot.status=insufficient_evidence (no income/balance/cashflow), valuation_snapshot.pe_ratio=-0.21 (negative earnings), roe=-1.31, roa=-0.96 → severe profitability headwinds, missing data
6. Assess sleeve fit (surge_short): requires corroborating alt-data catalyst + negative fundamentals. Alt-data sparse, catalyst absent → surge_short not met
7. Assess sleeve fit (quality_long): requires positive profitability + strong fundamentals. Profitability negative (PE, ROE, ROA all negative), fundamentals insufficient → quality_long not met

8. Evaluate veto conditions: insufficient_evidence=true (missing fundamentals, news, alt-data), missing_data_persists_beyond_tolerance=true, information_integrity_veto=true (use_as_primary_signal_allowed=false) → multiple vetoes tripped
9. Decision: veto conditions tripped → decision=no_trade, position_size_pct=0.0, confidence=low, uncertainty=high
decision_log: T0: Envelope validation — PIT-safe, lookahead_safe=true, data_after_cutoff_used=false ✓
T1: Macro regime assessment — Moderately Restrictive (stress_score=1), equity_cap=30%, strict_quality_and_valuation discipline → restrictive environment
T2: Catalyst assessment (Agent-02 equivalent) — news_event_summary.status=data_unavailable, 0 items post-cutoff → no narrative catalyst available

T3: Corroboration assessment (Agent-03 equivalent) — alternative_data_features sparse: Wikipedia 8-25 views/day (low), GitHub unmapped (failed), retail_meme_attention not_evaluated, sec_13f unavailable → cannot corroborate catalyst

T4: Fundamentals assessment (Agent-04 equivalent) — fundamental_snapshot.status=insufficient_evidence (no income/balance/cashflow), valuation_snapshot.pe_ratio=-0.21, roe=-1.31, roa=-0.96 → severe profitability headwinds, missing data
T5: Sleeve fit assessment (surge_short) — requires corroborating alt-data catalyst + negative fundamentals. Alt-data sparse, catalyst absent, fundamentals insufficient → surge_short not met
T6: Sleeve fit assessment (quality_long) — requires positive profitability + strong fundamentals. Profitability negative (PE, ROE, ROA all negative), fundamentals insufficient → quality_long not met
T7: Risk assessment (Agent-07 equivalent) — veto conditions: insufficient_evidence=true, missing_data_persists_beyond_tolerance=true, information_integrity_veto=true → multiple vetoes tripped
T8: Final decision — no_trade (fail-closed per rule §13.4), position_size_pct=0.0, confidence=low, uncertainty=high
